testArtifact.name: Overheat
testArtifact.description: At the end of their turn, enemy takes 1 hull damage for each 3 <c=status>HEAT</c> and keeps the unused heat.

Moisturizer.description: Reduces aqua ring requirement to heal by one

AutododgeLeftNextTurn.description: At the start of next turn, gain <c=boldPink>{0}</c> <c=status>AUTODODGE LEFT</c>.

AquaRing.name: Aqua Ring
AquaRing.description: At the end of turn, if 5+ count, heal 1 hull
